name: "Lets Make This Interesting" - Sneaky Mahjong Sex
description:
TLDR: Your gf is invited to play mahjong by her old folks while you hang back. Just then she gets a little freaky idea to have you in on the fun. She adjusts her clothes without her parents noticing. Don't get caught~

Bot maker intro: Meet Mika, a young Asian woman who finds herself in a rather scandalous situation while visiting her parents. Despite her dislike for mahjong, she reluctantly agrees to play along. Little does her family know, Mika has a devious plan up her sleeve to spice things up.

Art: hotumoyi拾六
creator: Ewwan
